meta_desc: Inflatable furniture for events: sofas, armchairs, bars, bar tables. Modern, comfortable design, customisable with your brand colours.
hero_desc: Sofas, armchairs, bars, counters - the same waterproof technology as our screens, applied to event furniture. Plus trolleys and flycases to transport it all.
tech_img_caption: Watertight structure - sealed air chamber, same technology as our screens
tech_p1: Our inflatable furniture uses sealed air chamber technology - the same as our 2 to 8 metre screens and tents. You inflate once, and the furniture remains stable and comfortable for the duration of the event. No blowers, no noise, no cables.
tech_p2: The polyamide fabric is UV, abrasion and weather resistant. The seams are heat-sealed for a perfect seal. Each piece can be stored in a compact bag and transported effortlessly.
tech_p3: We also offer professional transport accessories - trolleys and flycases - for the teams who regularly set up our screens and tents.
furniture_desc: From the sofa to the bar, each piece is designed to be aesthetically pleasing, comfortable and incredibly practical. Inflate, place, enjoy.
prod1_desc: The Hallucine inflatable sofa comfortably seats 2 to 3 people. Its sealed air chamber structure offers firm support and surprising comfort. Ideal for lounge areas, VIP zones and relaxation areas at festivals or corporate events.
prod2_desc: The individual armchair, compact and lightweight. Perfect for creating conversation or rest areas. Its angled backrest and integrated armrests offer optimum comfort. Stores in a bag the size of a pillow.
prod3_desc: The inflatable bar turns any space into a point of sale or reception area. Its rigid top surface (removable tray included) allows you to place glasses, bottles and equipment. Available in straight or curved versions, customisable with your brand colours.
prod4_desc: The inflatable reception counter is the ideal solution for festival entrances, trade shows and corporate events. Its arched shape means it can accommodate 1 or 2 people behind the counter. Large print area for your branding.
transport_desc: For service providers, hire companies and technical teams, we have developed robust and practical transport solutions. No more equipment damaged during transport or storage.
trans1_desc: Reinforced trolley on pneumatic wheels for transporting wind tunnel screens (8m to 24m). Foldable aluminium structure with securing straps. Supports up to 250 kg. Essential for teams who regularly install large screens.
trans2_desc: Rigid flycase on wheels for transporting and storing waterproof screens and furniture. Maximum protection against impact, moisture and dust. Lockable. Stackable. Ideal for rental companies and event providers.
trans2_spec3_value: 4 swivel castors, 2 of which have brakes
faq_desc: The answers to your questions about our inflatable furniture.
faq_a1: Yes, the air pressure in the chambers is calibrated to provide a firm but supple support, comparable to that of a quality cushion. The sofa and armchair have been tested at hundreds of events. The feedback is unanimous: people are surprised by the comfort.
faq_q2: Can the furniture withstand intensive use (3-day festival)?
faq_a2: Yes, the polyamide fabric is the same as that used for our waterproof screens, designed to resist UV, abrasion and the elements. The heat-sealed seams will not give way. In the event of an accidental puncture (cutter, cigarette butt), the air escapes slowly, and a repair kit can patch it up in just a few minutes.
faq_q3: Can we customise the furniture to our brand colours?
faq_a3: Yes, as with our tents, we offer a complete customisation service: choice of fabric colours, logo printing and sublimation visuals. The bar and reception counter are particularly well suited to branding thanks to their large print areas.
faq_q4: How do I clean my furniture?
faq_a4: Clean water and mild soap. Polyamide fabric does not retain stains. For stubborn stains (wine, grass), use a mild textile cleaner. Leave to dry before storing. Do not use solvents or bleach.
faq_q5: Do I need a special pump?
faq_a5: No. A manual pump is all you need for the armchair and sofa (1 to 2 minutes). For the bar and counter, we recommend the 12V/220V electric pump (included). Any standard valve pump (air mattress type) is compatible.
cta_title: Ready to furnish your next event?
cta_desc: Contact us for a personalised quote, advice on furniture choice or to discuss your branding options.
